items.title: Samsung Electronics reaches $1 trillion market cap thanks to surging demand for AI chips
items.summary: The world's largest maker of memory chips, South Korea's Samsung Electronics, has seen its valuation reach $1 trillion this Wednesday. The company's profits have soared thanks to strong demand for the chips used to power artificial intelligence systems. Also in this edition: French oil major TotalEnergies says it will have to scrap caps on fuel prices if it faces a windfall tax on its profits in France.

His analysis highlights the legal and ethical dilemmas surrounding a cruise ship carrying suspected hantavirus cases off the coast of Cape Verde. items.title: How unbreakable is Iran's regime? Tehran defiant despite deepening hardship for citizens
items.summary: Iran's economy may be teetering on the brink of collapse, but does that really threaten its regime? Monday's flare-up of hostilities across the Strait of Hormuz makes clear that oil's not about to start flowing freely again. Tehran and Washington are both signalling they can bear the pain of lost revenue and inflation, with Iran arguably taking that brinkmanship further.

items.title: Arsenal to play first Champions League final in 20 years
items.summary: Arsenal have reached the Champions League final for the first time since 2006 following their 1-0 victory over Atletico Madrid on Tuesday.

items.title: Ukraine reports Russian drone, missile attacks after Kyiv-declared ceasefire begins
items.summary: Ukraine said Russia had continued to launch drone and missile attacks into the country on Wednesday morning, hours after a unilateral ceasefire declared by Kyiv had come into effect. Both Kyiv and Moscow announced competing ceasefires on different dates this week as Russia prepares to celebrate the anniversary of the Soviet Union's victory over Nazi Germany.

items.title: Man accused of anti-Semitic Bondi Beach mass shooting faces 19 extra charges
items.summary: Naveed Akram, the 24-year-old man accused of killing 15 people after opening fire on a crowd celebrating the Jewish festival of Hanukkah at Australia's Bondi Beach in December 2025, is facing 19 additional charges, court records showed on Wednesday. Akram's father and alleged accomplice Sajid was shot and killed by police during the attack.

items.title: Teen shooter at Brazilian school kills two staff, injures children
items.summary: A 13-year-old student was arrested after a school shooting in Brazil’s Acre on Tuesday that left two staff members dead and two others injured, including an 11-year-old girl. The attack at Sao Jose Institute has shocked the country, which has seen a rise in violence at schools in recent years.

items.title: Middle East war live: French firm says container ship was 'target of attack' in Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: A container ship owned by French shipping company CMA CGM was the "target of an attack" in the Strait of Hormuz, the firm said Wednesday, without specifying who had carried out the attack. Those wounded in the attack were sent away for treatment. Follow our liveblog for all the latest updates.

items.title: G7 trade ministers meet in Paris as global tensions and tariff threats mount
items.summary: G7 trade ministers have gathered in Paris as global economic tensions intensify, with talks set to focus on critical minerals, industrial policy and trade resilience. The meeting comes against a backdrop of Middle East turmoil and renewed US tariff threats, adding pressure to already strained efforts to coordinate a unified response among major economies.

items.title: Rubio says US military completed offensive operations in Iran
items.summary: The United States said on Tuesday that it had ended offensive operations against Iran. But Washington warned it could unleash a “devastating” response to new threats in the Strait of Hormuz, as clashes and rival warnings from Tehran raised fears that a fragile ceasefire could collapse.

items.title: Guerre en Ukraine : Kiev accuse Moscou d'avoir violé son cessez-le-feu unilatéral
items.summary: ⁠L'Ukraine a accusé mercredi ⁠matin la Russie d'avoir ​violé au cours de la nuit le cessez-le-feu initié par son président Volodimir Zelensky, ​les autorités du pays faisant état d'un mort et de trois blessés dans plusieurs zones du front.

translation.title: War in Ukraine: Kiev accuses Moscow of violating its unilateral ceasefire
translation.summary: On Wednesday, Ukraine accused Russia of violating the ceasefire initiated by its President Volodimir Zelensky during the night, with the authorities reporting one death and three injuries in several areas of the front.

items.title: Avec le retour de la Russie, la Biennale de Venise ouvre dans un climat sulfureux
items.summary: Démission du jury, boycott du ministre de la Culture, menaces de l'UE: la 61e édition de la Biennale de Venise ouvre ses portes mercredi en avant-première à la presse dans un climat rendu inflammable par le retour de la Russie, absente depuis 2022.

translation.title: With the return of Russia, the Venice Biennale opens in a sulphurous climate
translation.summary: Resignation of the jury, boycott of the Minister of Culture, EU threats: the 61st edition of the Venice Biennale opens its doors Wednesday as a preview to the press in a climate made flammable by the return of Russia, absent since 2022.

items.title: Hantavirus : le navire accostera à Tenerife aux Canaries
items.summary: Le navire de croisière frappé par un foyer d'hantavirus accostera dans les prochains jours à Tenerife, sur l'une des îles de l'archipel des Canaries, a annoncé mercredi la télévision publique espagnole (RTVE), citant des sources au sein du ministère espagnol de la Santé.

translation.title: Hantavirus: the ship will dock in Tenerife, Canary Islands
translation.summary: The cruise ship struck by a hantavirus home will dock in the coming days in Tenerife, on one of the islands of the Canary Islands, announced on Wednesday the Spanish public television (RTVE), citing sources within the Spanish Ministry of Health.

items.title: Détroit d'Ormuz : Donald Trump suspend son opération d'escorte de navires
items.summary: Donald Trump a annoncé la suspension de son "Projet Liberté" d'escorte de navires dans le détroit d'Ormuz, le temps de voir si "un accord peut être finalisé et signé" avec l'Iran, après ce que le président américain a qualifié de "grands progrès" dans les négociations.

translation.title: Ormuz Strait: Donald Trump suspends ship escort operation
translation.summary: Donald Trump announced the suspension of his "Freedom Project" of escorts of ships in the Strait of Ormuz, time to see if "an agreement can be finalized and signed" with Iran, after what the US President called "great progress" in the negotiations.

items.title: Élisabeth Borne quitte la direction de Renaissance "en désaccord avec la ligne actuelle" du parti
items.summary: À un an de l'élection présidentielle, Élisabeth Borne a annoncé, mercredi, se retirer de la direction du parti présidentiel Renaissance. Elle s'est dit, sur France Inter, "en désaccord avec la ligne actuelle" portée par le secrétaire général Gabriel Attal.

translation.title: Élisabeth Borne leaves the Renaissance leadership "in disagreement with the current line" of the party
translation.summary: One year before the presidential election, Elizabeth Borne announced on Wednesday that she would withdraw from the leadership of the Renaissance presidential party. She said, on France Inter, "disagree with the current line" carried by Secretary General Gabriel Attal.

items.title: Guerre en Ukraine : Moscou attaque Zaporijjia et ne respecte pas la trêve
items.summary: "Les raids aériens russes ne sont pas doublés de victoire sur le plan militaire, pour l'instant, le long de la ligne de front. Pour la première fois depuis août 2024, [...] la Russie perd beaucoup de terrain", explique Emmanuelle Chaze, correspondante France 24 à Kharkiv en Ukraine.

translation.title: War in Ukraine: Moscow attacks Zaporijjia and does not respect the truce
translation.summary: "Russian air raids are not doubled in military victory, for the moment, along the front line. For the first time since August 2024, [...] Russia is losing a lot of ground," explains Emmanuelle Chaze, France 24 correspondent in Kharkiv, Ukraine.

items.title: Trump suspend temporairement l'opération militaire américaine dans l'espoir d'un accord avec l'Iran
items.summary: "Il est difficile de ne pas y voir une manœuvre de politique intérieure, le congrès américain doit prochainement se prononcer sur l'opportunité et le cadre légal de cette intervention", analyse Matthieu Mabin, correspondant France 24 à Washington aux États-Unis.

translation.title: Trump temporarily suspends US military operation in hopes of an agreement with Iran
translation.summary: "It is difficult not to see this as a domestic policy manoeuvre, the American Congress will soon have to decide on the opportunity and legal framework for this intervention," says Matthieu Mabin, correspondent France 24 in Washington, USA.

items.title: Les chefs de la diplomatie iranienne et chinoise s'entretiennent à Pékin
items.summary: "Washington renforce ses sanctions contre Téhéran, celles-ci touchent inévitablement la Chine. Cinq entreprises chinoises ont récemment été placées sur la liste noire des interdictions de transaction et des gels des avoirs", explique Yena Lee, correspondante France 24 à Pékin, en Chine.

translation.title: Iranian and Chinese diplomatic leaders meet in Beijing
translation.summary: "Washington is stepping up its sanctions against Tehran, which inevitably affect China. Five Chinese companies have recently been placed on the blacklist of transaction bans and asset freezes," explains Yena Lee, France 24 correspondent in Beijing, China.

items.title: Biennale de Venise : "L'obscénité de l'art apolitique"
items.summary: À la Une de la presse, mercredi, le retour de l'instabilité politique en Roumanie, après le vote d’une motion de censure. La colère en Italie, après les nouvelles critiques de Donald Trump sur le pape Léon VIV. L'Italie, où la Biennale de Venise ouvrira ses portes ce samedi, sur fond de polémique sur la participation d'Israël et de la Russie. Polémique, également, en France, après la publication du rapport Alloncle sur l’audiovisuel public. Et un rendez-vous football très attendu.

translation.title: Venice Biennale: "The Obscenity of Apolitical Art"
translation.summary: On the front page of the press, Wednesday, the return of political instability in Romania, after the vote on a motion of censure. Anger in Italy, after Donald Trump's new criticism of Pope Leo VIV. Italy, where the Venice Biennale will open this Saturday, in the background of controversy over the participation of Israel and Russia. In France, too, the polemic following the publication of the Alloncle report on public audiovisual. And a very anticipated football date.

items.title: "On n'a même pas amorcé la trajectoire" : le plastique toujours omniprésent dans les supermarchés
items.summary: Dans un rapport publié mardi, Que Choisir Ensemble et No Plastic In My Sea dénoncent l'omniprésence du plastique dans les supermarchés. Les deux associations distinguent cependant les magasins bio, "en avance", et les enseignes de hard discount, où la "transition" reste "à commencer".

translation.title: "We didn't even start the trajectory": plastic still ubiquitous in supermarkets
translation.summary: In a report published Tuesday, Que Choisir Ensemble and No Plastic In My Sea denounce the omnipresence of plastic in supermarkets. The two associations, however, distinguish between organic shops, "in advance", and hard discount brands, where "transition" remains "to begin".

items.summary: 大美中国，江山如画。 党的十八大以来，习近平总书记的考察足迹遍及神州大地。祁连山麓、坝上林海，秦岭深处、黄河之滨，总书记在大江奔涌处谋划千秋大计，在山川锦绣间擘画生态蓝图。一系列重要论述，为新时代生态文明建设提供了根本遵循和行动指南。  世界环境日到来之际，我们跟随习近平总书记的脚步，一起呵护山水、寄情山水，领悟守护绿水青山、建设生态文明之道。  江河为脉 心系长江之变，习近平总书记前往沿江重镇，考察长江经济带发展。从三峡库区到洞庭湖畔，从港口码头到企业车间，总书记深入调研，作出一系列重要指示，为新时代江河保护治理提供了重要遵循。  2018年4月，习近平总书记来到湖南岳阳城陵矶水文站考察。在狭窄的站房外长廊上，习近平总书记举目远眺。“共抓大保护，不搞大开发”的战略定力，在这里化作守护一江碧水的坚定行动。  2023年10月10日下午，习近平总书记在江西九江市考察，冒雨在江边察看，了解当地长江国家文化公园建设、长江岸线生态修复等情况。10月12日，总书记在进一步推动长江经济带高质量发展座谈会上回顾长江经济带发展历程，感慨：“做就要做好，坚定做下去。笃行不怠，一以贯之，久久为功。” 黄河

items.title: 学习手记 | “环境就是民生”
items.summary: 6月5日是世界环境日，也是我国环境保护法确立的环境日。 22年前的这一天，在时任浙江省委书记习近平部署推动下，以农村人居环境整治为重点的“千万工程”启动。 当时，习近平同志担任浙江省委书记刚半年多，工作千头万绪。他何以将农村人居环境整治作为重点工作？ 在基层调研时，习近平同志发现，在浙江经济快速发展的同时，广大农村却面临“成长的烦恼”，村庄面貌不如人意。 全省3.4万个村庄中，人居环境较好的仅4000个。有人形容：“走过一村又一村，村村都是垃圾村。”还有农民这样描述：“起早贪黑赚钞票，垃圾堆里数钞票，躺在医院花钞票。”可以说，人居环境整治是当时浙江农村群众的一个迫切期盼。 “千万工程”聚焦乡亲们走什么村道、怎么处理畜禽粪便等小问题，却直接关系农民获得感、幸福感，是实打实的民生大事。 老百姓的生活环境如何，习近平同志念兹在兹： 上世纪70年代，在陕北冯家坪公社赵家河大队驻点时，他撸起袖管，一石一瓦盖起村里第一个男女分开的厕所； 到正定工作，不仅大力推进“人拉猪吃”的“连茅圈”改造工作，还拿着大扫帚走上街头搞卫生，推动成立全县第一支专职卫生清洁队； 任福州市委书记，亲自为建造垃圾处理场选址

translation.title: Learn the handbooks.
translation.summary: 5 June is World Environment Day and the environmental day established by our environmental protection laws. Twenty-two years ago, with the deployment of Xi Jinping, then Secretary-General of Zhejiang Province, the “millions of projects” focusing on the environmental rehabilitation of rural settlements were launched. At that time, Comrade Xi had been the secretary of the Zhejiang province for more than six months and had been working for a long time. Why does he focus on the rehabilitation of the rural habitat environment? At the grass-roots level, Comrade Xi found that while the Zhejiang economy was growing rapidly, the rural areas were faced with “growth problems” and the villages were less than satisfactory. Out of 34,000 villages in the province, only 4,000 have a better habitat. It was described as “a village after a village, which is full of garbage”. And the farmers described it as: “Getting up early and making money, counting it in the trash, spending it in the hospital.” It can be said that the remediation of the habitat environment was an urgent aspiration of the rural population of Zhejiang at the time. The fact that millions of projects focus on small problems such as what villages to follow and how to deal with animal and animal dung is a matter of life for the farmers. items.summary: 新华社合肥6月5日电 中共中央政治局委员、国务院副总理刘国中3日至5日到安徽调研“三夏”农业生产工作。他强调，要深入学习贯彻习近平总书记关于国家粮食安全的重要论述，按照党中央、国务院部署，扛稳政治责任，毫不放松抓好夏收夏种夏管，全力以赴夺取夏粮丰收，全面打牢秋粮生产基础，确保完成全年粮食生产目标任务。 刘国中先后来到宿州市、淮南市、六安市，深入小麦机收和夏播现场、农机跨区作业服务点、农事服务中心、粮食仓储中心、地方农科院等，实地察看夏收夏种、农机作业服务保障、粮食烘干收储等工作，详细了解农作物新品种选育、大面积单产提升、农资保供稳价、高标准农田建设等情况。 刘国中强调，“三夏”工作抓得好不好，事关全年粮食生产目标任务能否顺利实现。当前正值“三夏”农业生产关键时期，要抓住有利天气抢晴收获，组织好农机跨区作业，强化服务保障和安全管理，确保夏收高效进行。要抓实抓牢机收减损、烘干晾晒等各项措施，最大程度减少粮食损失。要精心做好夏粮收购工作，引导各类企业积极入市，保障粮食市场平稳运行。要压茬推进夏播，加强农资供应和农事服务，强化技术集成及推广应用，落实落细合理密植、精量播种等大面积单产提升措施，

items.title: 韩正会见中美高级别二轨对话美方代表团
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 6月5日，国家副主席韩正在北京会见中美高级别二轨对话美方代表团。 韩正表示，中美关系是当今世界最重要的双边关系之一。当前，中美关系处于关键历史节点。中美相互尊重、和平共处、合作共赢，不仅有利于两国，也有利于世界和平与发展。希望中美高级别二轨对话能不断汇聚两国有识之士的真知灼见，增进美国各界对中国的了解和理解，共同推动中美关系稳定、健康、可持续发展。 美方表示，美中高级别二轨对话有助于双方更好理解对方，为两国关系发展提供更多有益思路。中国经济发展令人钦佩，双方应加强贸易、投资等领域对话合作。

translation.title: Han is meeting with the United States delegation to the High-level Second Track Dialogue between China and the United States
translation.summary: On 5 June, the Vice-President of Xinhua, Han, met in Beijing with the United States delegation to the High-level Second Track Dialogue between China and the United States. Han is saying that Chinese-American relations are one of the most important bilateral relations in the world today. Currently, US-China relations are at a critical historical node. Mutual respect, peaceful coexistence and co-operation between China and the United States are beneficial not only to both countries but also to world peace and development. It is to be hoped that the high-level second-track dialogue between China and the United States will continue to bring together the insights of knowledgeable people from the two countries, enhance understanding and understanding of China among the United States, and work together to promote stable, healthy and sustainable relations between China and the United States. The United States side stated that the two sides would benefit from a better understanding of each other and from more useful ideas for the development of their relations. China ' s economic development was admirable, and the two sides should strengthen dialogue and cooperation in the areas of trade and investment.

items.title: 国务院印发《关于开展第四次全国农业普查的通知》
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电　国务院日前印发《关于开展第四次全国农业普查的通知》（以下简称《通知》）。根据《中华人民共和国统计法》和《全国农业普查条例》规定，国务院决定于2026年开展第四次全国农业普查。 　　《通知》强调，第四次全国农业普查是在以中国式现代化全面推进中华民族伟大复兴的新征程上开展的一项重大国情国力调查，要以习近平新时代中国特色社会主义思想为指导，深入贯彻党的二十大和二十届二中、三中全会精神，认真落实党中央、国务院决策部署，坚持依法普查、科学普查、为民普查，坚持实事求是、守正创新，全面摸清新时代我国“三农”家底，客观反映农业发展新情况、乡村建设新面貌、农民生活新变化、农村改革新成效。 　　《通知》指出，第四次全国农业普查的对象是在中华人民共和国境内的农村住户，包括农村农业生产经营户和其他住户；城镇农业生产经营户；农业生产经营单位；村民委员会；乡镇人民政府。普查的主要内容包括农业生产条件、粮食和大食物生产情况、农业新质生产力情况、乡村发展基本情况、农村居民生活情况等。普查的标准时点为2026年12月31日24时，时期资料为2026年年度资料。 　　《通知》要求，各地区、各部门要按

translation.summary: Xinhua News Service, Beijing, 5 June In accordance with the Statistical Law of the People ' s Republic of China and the Regulations on the National Agricultural Census, the State Council decided to conduct the Fourth National Agricultural Census in 2026. The Circular stressed that the Fourth National Agricultural Census was a major national survey on the new quest for a comprehensive revival of the Chinese nation through China's modernization, guided by the Chinese socialist ideology of Xi Jinping's new era, and guided by the spirit of the 20th and 20th China-China Congresses, and by the serious implementation of the Party's central and State Council's decision-making process. It was determined that the census should be conducted in accordance with the law, that the scientific census should be conducted and that the census should be conducted for the people's census, that it should be carried out in accordance with the law, that it should be carried out in a realistic and innovative manner, and that the “three farmers” of the new era should be thoroughly examined in order to objectively reflect new developments in agricultural development, new aspects of rural construction, new changes in rural life and new effects of rural reform. The Circular states that the Fourth National Agricultural Survey is aimed at rural households in the People ' s Republic of China, including rural agricultural producers and other households; urban agricultural producers; agricultural production units; villagers ' committees; and town and town people ' s governments. The main elements of the census include agricultural production conditions, food and food production, new quality of agricultural productivity, basics of rural development, living conditions of rural residents, etc. The standard time of the census is 2400 hours on 31 December 2026, and the data for the period is annual 2026. items.title: 中央军委主席习近平签署命令 发布《军事设施建设条例》
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 中央军委主席习近平日前签署命令，发布《军事设施建设条例》，自2025年8月1日起施行。 条例深入贯彻习近平强军思想，深入贯彻新时代军事战略方针，聚焦服务备战打仗，适应新的领导指挥体制和保障模式，科学规范军事设施建设的基本原则、管理体制、运行机制和工作制度，是军事设施建设工作的重要依据。 条例共11章63条，按照军委管总、战区主战、军种主建的总原则，围绕理顺建设链、管理链、监督链，重点从军事设施建设计划管理、项目审批、工程发包、勘察设计、施工管理、应急建设、安全保密、监督问责等方面，厘清管理权限，优化流程机制，固化实践成果，为提高军事设施建设质量效益和保障能力提供有力法治保障。

translation.title: The President of the Central Military Commission, Xi Jinping, signed an order to issue regulations on the construction of military installations
translation.summary: Xinhua News Agency, Beijing, 5 June The regulations further implement Xi Jinping ' s military doctrine, the strategic military approach of the new era, the focus on service preparation for combat, the adaptation of the new model of command and control, and the scientific regulation of the basic principles of the construction of military facilities, the regulatory framework, the operational mechanisms and the working system, are important bases for the construction of military facilities. In accordance with the general principles of the Military Commission ' s General Administration, the main war zone and military construction, the regulations provide for the clarification of management competencies, the optimization of process mechanisms, the consolidation of practical results and the provision of robust rule of law guarantees for the quality and safety of military facilities, in accordance with the general principles of the Military Commission, chapter 11, section 63, and the streamlining of the construction chain, the management chain and the chain of supervision, with emphasis on the management of the military facilities construction plan, project approval, engineering contracting, survey design, construction management, emergency response, security confidentiality and oversight accountability.

items.title: 中共中央办公厅印发《党组讨论和决定党员处分事项工作程序规定》

translation.title: The Central Office of the Communist Republic of China issues the Regulations on the working procedures for the discussion and decision of party membership matters
translation.summary: In recent days, the Central Office of the Communist Party of China (CPC) issued a circular on working procedures for discussion and decision-making on party membership matters by Xinhua on 5 June in Beijing, and issued a circular requiring all regional departments to comply with it in good faith. The text of the Working Procedures Provisions for the Discussion and Decision of the Members of the Party Groups is reproduced below. Article 1 of the working procedures for the discussion and decision of party membership matters (approved by the Central Office of the Chinese Communist Party on 29 November 2018 and issued by the Central Office of the Chinese Communist Party on 29 November 2018 and revised by the Central Office of the Chinese Communist Party on 26 May 2025) lays down the present rules for the discussion and decision of party membership matters, in accordance with the Regulations on the Work of the Chinese Communist Party Group and the Regulations on the Approval of Competences and Procedures for the Punishment of Disciplinary Violations by the Chinese Communist Party. (b) To apply the spirit of reform and strict criteria to govern the party, to ensure that the party group (including the party committee of its nature, together with the other party members) is fully accountable to the party ' s principals, to strengthen the monitoring role of the monitoring and oversight bodies (hereinafter referred to as the accredited bodies) and to promote a culture of discipline and anti-corruption with a strict tone, strict measures and strict atmosphere. Article 3 imposes party disciplinary sanctions on members of the party ' s group management, and the inspection and inspection committee (hereinafter referred to as the sent-in agency) appointed by the party ' s team, the disciplinary committee (hereinafter referred to as the sent-in agency) and the accredited body, among others, shall perform their duties in accordance with the established competencies and procedures, enhance coordination and communication, establish an orderly and smooth line of communication and work together to achieve political, disciplinary and social coherence. items.title: 全国人大常委会启动节约能源法执法检查
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 为推动节约能源法全面有效实施，促进更高水平、更高质量做好节能工作，全国人大常委会5日启动节约能源法执法检查。 节约能源法自1998年1月1日实施，并于2007年、2016年、2018年进行了修改。 记者5日从全国人大常委会节约能源法执法检查组第一次全体会议上了解到，为全面深入了解法律实施情况，此次执法检查采取实地检查与委托检查相结合的方式，检查组将赴天津、江苏、湖南、广东、广西、四川等省（区、市）开展实地检查，并委托北京、河北、山西、吉林、上海、重庆等省（市）人大常委会对本行政区域内节约能源法实施情况进行检查。检查组将采取实地检查、听取汇报、组织座谈、典型调研、专题研究、抽查暗访等多种方式，全面准确了解法律实施情况，对带有普遍性的问题深入调查研究。 检查组将重点检查8方面内容：落实节能管理制度情况，推进重点领域节能工作情况，重点用能单位节能管理情况，推动节能技术进步情况，实施节能激励措施情况，与法律配套的行政法规、部门规章以及地方性法规的制定情况，法律实施中存在的其他问题，对节约能源法修改的意见和建议。

translation.title: The Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress initiated an energy-saving law enforcement inspection
translation.summary: In order to promote the full and effective implementation of the Energy Conservation Act and to promote higher and higher-quality energy efficiency, the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress launched an energy conservation law enforcement inspection on 5 June. The Energy Conservation Act has been in force since 1 January 1998 and was amended in 2007, 2016 and 2018. On 5 May, journalists learned from the first plenary meeting of the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress ' s Standing Committee on Energy Conservation Law Enforcement Inspection Unit that, in order to obtain a comprehensive and in-depth understanding of the implementation of the law, the inspection took the form of a combination of on-site inspections and commissioned inspections, which will be carried out in the provinces (districts and municipalities) of Tianjin, Jiangsu, Hunan, Guangdong, Guangxi, Sichuan and Beijing, Hebei, Shanxi, Jilin, Shanghai and Chongqing, among others. The Unit will have a comprehensive and accurate understanding of the implementation of the law and will conduct in-depth research and studies on issues of a general nature, in a variety of ways, including on-site inspections, debriefings, organization of talks, typical research, thematic studies, spot-checking and unannounced visits. The Unit will focus on eight areas: implementation of energy-saving management systems; promotion of energy-saving efforts in priority areas; focus on energy-saving management in energy-use units; promotion of technological progress in energy-saving; implementation of energy-saving incentives; development of administrative, sectoral and local regulations in conjunction with the law; other issues in the implementation of the law; and suggestions and recommendations for changes to the energy-saving law.
